name: Iced Brownies
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES:
In a mixing bowl, cream together sugar and butter. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in syrup and flour; stir in nuts. Pour batter into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched. Cool slightly.
Meanwhile, prepare the icing: In a small saucepan, combine sugar, butter, and milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil. Continue cooking for an additional 3 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and chocolate chips until melted (the mixture will be thin). Pour immediately over the cooled brownies. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
Note: If serving for two, freeze the brownies in an airtight container and thaw as needed.
Yield: 3 dozen
